title: A Sense of Dread
lines: The air in the tunnel is stagnant, but you hear a faint, metallic scraping coming from deep ahead.
Your flashlight flickers once, then twice. The shadows here feel heavy, as if they're leaning in to listen to your heartbeat.
You realize with a start that the scraping sound is perfectly timed with your own breathing.

options.desc: 3. Reach for the handle of the far door
